cases.alternative_reason: vinylogous conjugation relay: O3 adds to C4, the negative charge relays forward through the conjugated acceptor C4=C6-N8=O1 to the nitronate O and back, then Cl departs. NOT yet enumerable (needs ANIONIC vinylogous-relay support; cationic_relay_free_continuation only covers the cationic direction). Revisit when the anionic relay is implemented.
